attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
 WFP.BK_PROJECT_CODE,
 WFP.RU_BK_RECLASS_PROJECT_CODE,
 WFP.START_TV_DATE,
 WFP.END_TV_DATE,
 WFP.RU_BK_PARENT_PROJECT_CODE,
 WFP.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE,
 WFP.BK_COMPANY_CODE,
 WFP.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT,
 WFP.RU_BK_RECLASS_PROJ_LCLTY_INT,
 WFP.RU_BK_PARENT_PROJ_LCLTY_INT,
 WFP.FINANCIAL_PROJECT_PROJECT_NAME,
 WFP.FINANCIAL_PROJECT_ENABLED_FLAG,
 WFP.SPENDING_LEVEL_AMOUNT,
 WFP.FINANCIAL_PROJECT_USAGE_DESCR,
 WFP.PROGRAM_MANAGER_PARTY_KEY,
 WFP.RECLASS_ROLE,
 WFP.PARENT_ROLE,
 WFP.SS_CODE,
 WFP.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
 WFP.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME,
 WFP.EDW_CREATE_USER,
 WFP.EDW_UPDATE_USER,
 WFP.SK_PROJECT_VALUE_NUM,
 WFP.SK_SI_FLEX_STRUCT_ID_INT,
 WFP.BK_FIN_PROJ_CATEGORY_ID_INT 
FROM
$$WORKDB.W_FINANCIAL_PROJECT WFP WHERE WFP.DML_TYPE='I'
	AND (WFP.BK_PROJECT_CODE,WFP.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT,WFP.START_TV_DATE) NOT IN (SELECT NFP.BK_PROJECT_CODE,NFP.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT,
	NFP.START_TV_DATE from $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_PROJECT_TV NFP)

SELECT 
 NFPT.BK_PROJECT_CODE,
 NFPT.RU_BK_RECLASS_PROJECT_CODE,
 NFPT.RU_BK_PARENT_PROJECT_CODE,
 NFPT.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE,
 NFPT.BK_COMPANY_CODE,
 NFPT.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT,
 NFPT.RU_BK_RECLASS_PROJ_LCLTY_INT,
 NFPT.RU_BK_PARENT_PROJ_LCLTY_INT,
 NFPT.FINANCIAL_PROJECT_PROJECT_NAME,
 NFPT.FINANCIAL_PROJECT_ENABLED_FLAG,
 NFPT.SPENDING_LEVEL_AMOUNT,
 NFPT.FINANCIAL_PROJECT_USAGE_DESCR,
 NFPT.PROGRAM_MANAGER_PARTY_KEY,
 NFPT.RECLASS_ROLE,
 NFPT.PARENT_ROLE,
 NFPT.SS_CODE,
 NFPT.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
 NFPT.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME,
 NFPT.EDW_CREATE_USER,
 NFPT.EDW_UPDATE_USER,
 NFPT.SK_PROJECT_VALUE_NUM,
 NFPT.SK_SI_FLEX_STRUCT_ID_INT,
 NFPT.BK_FIN_PROJ_CATEGORY_ID_INT 
FROM
 $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_PROJECT_TV NFPT
 WHERE END_TV_DATE = '3500-01-01'
AND NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_PROJECT NFP 
  WHERE 
        NFP.BK_PROJECT_CODE=NFPT.BK_PROJECT_CODE 
    AND NFP.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT=NFPT.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT)
